items.title: Samsung’s 32-inch 4K HDR Movingstyle M7 Smart Monitor with integrated stand hits new $550 all-time low ($150 off)
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale on Samsung monitors, Amazon is offering the brand’s latest 32-inch Movingstyle 4K UHD Smart Monitor for $549.99 shipped. This display has largely been selling at its full $700 price since launching around Black Friday last year, with only a handful of drops to about $580 along the way. Today’s offer, however, marks the steepest discount we’ve tracked for it so far, knocking $150 off its usual going rate for a solid 21% discount. Samsung is also matching this price on its own online store, so be sure to cash in on this deal after getting more details below.

items.title: This 48V Greenworks cordless electric mower, trimmer, blower combo with 2x batteries is down at $480 ($130 off)
items.summary:
Now that we are officially in spring, Amazon is offering folks a major bundle with this Greenworks 48V (24V x 2) Cordless Electric Combo Kit that provides a 21-inch Self-Propelled Mower, 12-inch String Trimmer, 320 CFM Blower alongside 2x 5.0Ah batteries and a dual-port charger at $479.98 shipped, which matches the brand’s direct website pricing. While you may see it holding a $700 MSRP direct from Greenworks, it’s really only been seen climbing as high as $610 at Amazon over the past year, with it having only gone as high as $568 in 2026 so far. While we have seen discounts take things a little lower in the past, you’re looking at the best price we have tracked since early Black Friday deals ended on November 20, 2025, saving you $130 off the highest going rate on Amazon and $220 off the MSRP. There’s plenty more Greenworks deals to shop in the brand’s official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Tenways flash sale drops premium Wayfarer cruiser e-bike with $366 FREE bundle to new $1,799 low ($766 savings), more
items.summary:
Tenways is currently offering two flash sale windows for its e-bikes, which will be ending within 27 hours at the time of writing this, giving you some time to jump on up to $766 in increased savings from the sale that started at the top of the month. The most notable of the two offers is Tenways’ newest Wayfarer Premium Cruiser e-bike with $366 in FREE gear at $1,799 shipped in both colorways. Since it was released back in October with a $2,199 tag, this e-bike has been included in sales with a $277 bundle (made up of a kickstand, rear cargo rack, and mudguards) that now has an additional large pannier bag ($89 value) included, which we’ve previously seen only cut down as low as $1,899. Now, during this flash sale, you’re getting a larger-than-ever combined $766 savings that lands it down at a new all-time low price. Additionally, you can find Tenways’ CGO800S Premium Step-Thru Commuter e-bike with a $277 bundle of FREE gear cut down to its second-lowest price of $1,799 shipped for the Pebble Grey and Sky Blue colorways. You’ll also score an extra $200 savings when buying any two e-bikes together. Head below to learn more about these e-bikes.
